turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental, this is Ava. How can I help?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I'd like to come in for a checkup.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help. May I have your full name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks, Carol. I can do Tuesday at 9am. Does that work?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're all set for Tuesday at 9am. Anything else?
